summary: Iteration 126: Verified supplier credit balance fix. When adding a credit bill, the fix now creates BOTH an expense (POST /expenses) AND a supplier payment (POST /supplier-payments), which correctly updates the credit balance. All 6 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Pre-existing HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody> in table structure (from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: HTML table structure warning persists in SupplierPaymentsPage.jsx - consider using React.Fragment instead of span wrappers for table body rows (pre-existing issue)
seed_data_creation: None - used small test amounts with cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 126: Verified supplier credit balance bug fix. The fix ensures that bill submission now creates BOTH an expense AND a supplier payment. POST /api/supplier-payments with payment_mode='credit' increases current_credit, and payment_mode='cash' or 'bank' decreases current_credit. DELETE also correctly reverses the credit change. Frontend forms on SupplierPaymentsPage and SuppliersPage are working correctly with 'credit' as the default payment mode for bills.

credit_payment_increases_balance.details: Verified: initial credit + 10 SAR = new credit after credit payment

cash_payment_decreases_balance.details: Verified: credit balance decreased by payment amount

bank_payment_decreases_balance.details: Verified: credit balance decreased by payment amount

delete_credit_payment_reverses_increase.test_case: Deleting credit payment reverses the credit increase
delete_credit_payment_reverses_increase.details: Verified: credit returned to original value after deleting credit payment

delete_cash_payment_reverses_decrease.test_case: Deleting cash payment reverses the credit decrease
delete_cash_payment_reverses_decrease.details: Verified: credit restored after deleting cash payment

full_flow_credit_then_cash.test_case: Add credit bill → Pay cash → Verify final balance
full_flow_credit_then_cash.details: Verified: initial + credit_amount - cash_payment = final balance

frontend_supplier_payments_add_bill.test_case: Add Bill form visible and 'credit' mode selected by default
frontend_supplier_payments_add_bill.details: Add Bill button opens form with credit mode pre-selected

frontend_suppliers_add_bill_dialog.test_case: Add Bill dialog from supplier card works correctly
frontend_suppliers_add_bill_dialog.details: Add Bill button on supplier card opens dialog with credit mode default

frontend_credit_status_display.details: Found 7 supplier cards with Credit Status displayed

tests: Credit mode default for bills - PASS
Credit Status display on supplier cards - PASS

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Supplier credit balance not updating correctly after payments
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: When adding a credit bill, only an expense was created but the supplier's current_credit was NEVER updated
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Bill submission now creates BOTH an expense (POST /expenses) AND a supplier payment (POST /supplier-payments), which correctly updates the credit balance
